overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from a cinematic video game showing a character walking through a snowy mountain valley at night. The character follows a narrow path alongside a frozen river, surrounded by snow-covered terrain and evergreen trees under a dark, overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain trail alongside frozen river

events.description: bare branches briefly enter foreground on the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily along the snowy path beside the frozen river, moving deeper into the mountain valley

entered.detail: narrow trail covered in deep snow that the character is following
partially frozen waterway running parallel to the path on the left
snow-dusted pine trees lining the hillside on the right
steep snow-covered hillside rising into the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow snow-covered trail beside a frozen river in a mountainous valley at night. Evergreen trees dot the hillside to the right while distant mountains fade into the hazy darkness ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow mountain pass with rocky outcrops

events.description: terrain becomes rockier on the right as the path enters a more enclosed mountain pass

agents.ego_description: character continues walking forward as the path narrows between the river and rocky cliff face

entered.detail: dark rocky cliff face emerging from the snow on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The path narrows as the character enters a more enclosed mountain pass. A rocky cliff face emerges on the right while the frozen river falls further behind to the left. The evergreen trees become denser and more prominent against the dark sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate, frozen mountain valley under the cover of night. It begins by tracking a character as they navigate a narrow, snow-covered trail that hugs the edge of a frozen river. As the character advances, the camera reveals a hillside to the right dotted with dark evergreen trees. The scene then extends forward, where the rugged terrain gradually blends into a hazy darkness as distant mountains fade into the overcast horizon.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a wide valley narrows into a claustrophobic mountain pass. It begins with the character moving along a path where the frozen river gradually recedes to the left, leaving the open water behind. As the camera advances, a steep rocky cliff face emerges on the right, tightening the space around the traveler. The scene then shifts as the surrounding evergreen trees grow denser and more imposing, their dark silhouettes pressing closer against the overcast night sky.
